Petition Fpr Amended Order For Final Distribution.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition Fpr Amended Order For Final Distribution.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Continued To Dec-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Reopen Probate
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order

For Order Confirming Property Ownership
Off Calendar Oct-23-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Lynn Searle appeared for Bette Louie and Lawrence Louie.

The Court stated that Probate Code 7000 was not authority for the request being made, and suggested that Ms. Searle re-open the probate characterizing the asset as real property interest. Counsel represented that the documets for the Louie partnership were not formulized, that the other properties were in joint tenancy, and that her client did not have the title document to be able to sell the property. Ms. Searle was directed to speak to Ms. Throwbridge (Examiner). The Court denied the petition.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Reporter: Trina Ayala CSR#12964. Bailiff: Rob Harris. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
